items.title: Iran says staff blocked from entering US after players given World Cup visas
items.summary: Iranian officials say technical staff have been denied visas, hours after the US said players could enter the country.

items.title: McKenna BLASTS through Streeter with first round ‘phonebox fight’ KO!
items.summary: Stephen McKenna marked his Zuffa Boxing debut with a first-round KO against Casey James Streeter in Bournemouth.

items.title: McKenna wants 'bigger' than 'boring' Cutler as rivals win to spark rematch talk
items.summary: Stephen McKenna ended his 539-day absence from the ring with a devastating stoppage of Casey James Streeter in Bournemouth, before renewing his war of words with "boring" rival Lee Cutler.

items.title: 'It looks like he's dislocated his shoulder!' | BIZARRE ending as Cutler secures TKO

items.summary: RAFAEL LEAO was sent off for striking an opponent in Portugal’s World Cup friendly. The AC Milan star, linked with a transfer to the Prem this summer, lost his head before half-time in the 2-1 win over Chile.
